# withUnsafeBytes(_:)

**Instance Method**

Call a function and pass a buffer representing the value of this instance’s [doc://org.swift.testing/documentation/Testing/Attachment/attachableValue-2tnj5] property to it.

## Declaration

```swift
borrowing func withUnsafeBytes<R>(_ body: (UnsafeRawBufferPointer) throws -> R) throws -> R
```

## Parameters

- **body**: A function to call. A temporary buffer containing a data representation of this instance is passed to it.

## Return Value

Whatever is returned by `body`.

## Discussion



The testing library uses this function when writing an attachment to a test report or to a file on disk. This function calls the [doc://org.swift.testing/documentation/Testing/Attachable/withUnsafeBytes(for:_:)] function on this attachment’s [doc://org.swift.testing/documentation/Testing/Attachment/attachableValue-2tnj5] property.
